name: Lemon Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly mix gelatin, 1/2 cup sugar and salt in a saucepan.
2. Beat together egg yolks, lemon juice and water; stir into gelatin mixture.
3. Cook over medium heat just until the mixture comes to a boil.
4. Remove from heat; stir in lemon zest.
5. Chill, stirring occasionally, until the mixture is partially set.
6. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
7. Gradually add 1/2 cup sugar, beating to stiff peaks.
8. Fold in gelatin mixture.
9. Pile into the cooled baked pastry shell and chill until firm.
10. Spread with sweetened whipped cream before serving. Alternatively, the cream may be folded into the filling with egg whites.
User++your note about the clear lemon meringue pie rang a bell as did the reference to the red and white checked cook book so I dug out my grandmother's cook book and found two recipes that may be what you want.
The book is the Better Homes and Gardens New Cook Book, revised edition, fifth printing, 1962.
